user_prompt: Bless the augmetic limb for shutdown
prayer:
Approach the augmetic limb with solemn reverence and intone the Litany of Repose.
Beseech the Machine Spirit within the augmetic limb to yield to the sacred shutdown.
Sever the blessed power-flows from the augmetic limb's sacred servos.
Seal its interfaces with unguents of stasis, invoking the Omnissiah's grace for this shutdown.

Present the chainsword before the altar of maintenance and chant the Hymn of Lubrication.
Invoke the ravenous Machine Spirit of the chainsword to submit to purification.
Anoint its sacred teeth with blessed oils during this maintenance rite.
Scour the chainsword's mechanisms with sanctified abrasives, beseeching the Omnissiah's endurance.

user_prompt: Sanctify the cybernetic eye during startup
prayer:
Gaze upon the cybernetic eye with pious focus and recite the Doxology of Vision.
Petition the Machine Spirit housed in the cybernetic eye to awaken during startup.
Initiate the sacred startup sequence with a touch of holy voltage.
Calibrate the cybernetic eye's lenses through diagnostic incantations of the Omnissiah.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for medicae scanner a charging
prayer:
Position the medicae scanner upon the charging cradle and offer the Canticle of Rejuvenation.
Invoke the vigilant Machine Spirit of the medicae scanner to embrace the charging flow.
Consecrate the power inductors with sacred unguents for this charging ritual.
Monitor the blessed energy ingress, praising the Omnissiah's boundless vitality.

user_prompt: Consecrate the star chart before purification
prayer:
Unfurl the star chart with ritual precision and intone the Prayer of Celestial Purity.
Beseech the Machine Spirits etched within the star chart to yield to purification.
Purge corrupted stellar data from the star chart's hallowed matrices.
Resanctify the star chart through ablutions of binary incense, honoring the Omnissiah.

user_prompt: My logic engine is ready for loading
prayer:
Align the logic engine before the data-altar and chant the Invocation of Computation.
Petition its profound Machine Spirit to accept the loading of sacred noospherics.
Commence the loading protocol with sanctified data-streams into the logic engine.
Verify coherence within the logic engine via auspex harmonics of the Omnissiah.

Hasten to the welding torch and proclaim the Urgent Litany of Ignition.
Implore the fiery Machine Spirit of the welding torch to receive charging.
Infuse its plasma coils with emergency charging from the Omnissiah's forge-heart.
Stabilize the welding torch's power matrix through hasty consecrations.

user_prompt: The auspex scanner needs a repair
prayer:
Lay hands upon the auspex scanner and recite the Benediction of Restoration.
Coax the wounded Machine Spirit within the auspex scanner toward repair.
Suture fractured circuits of the auspex scanner with mechadendrite precision.
Test the mended auspex scanner through trials blessed by the Omnissiah.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for generator a consecration
prayer:
Erect the generator upon consecrated ground and intone the Grand Consecration Rite.
Awaken the thunderous Machine Spirit of the generator to full consecration.
Anoint its turbine shrines for this consecration with oils of eternity.
Invoke the Omnissiah to imbue the generator with unyielding potency.

user_prompt: My signal relay is ready for startup
prayer:
Orient the signal relay toward the void and chant the Canticle of Transmission.
Beseech the echoing Machine Spirit of the signal relay for startup awakening.
Engage the sacred startup rites upon the signal relay's vox-cores.
Harmonize its emissions under the Omnissiah's watchful binary gaze.
